ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employment_stats" (
  "status" TEXT /* Employment status */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the population */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the population */,
  "region_itl1" TEXT /* Higher-level region identifier */,
  "region_itl2" TEXT /* Lower-level region identifier */,
  "headcount" INTEGER /* Headcount of employed individuals */,
  "fte" INTEGER /* Full-time equivalent count */,
  "mean_salary" REAL /* Mean salary for the demographic and region */,
  "median_salary" REAL /* Median salary for the demographic and region */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnic background of the population */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest level of education attained */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry in which the employment is recorded */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title or position */,
  "employment_type" TEXT /* Type of employment (e.g., full-time, part-time) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., survey, administrative records) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status", "year", "age_group", "sex", "region_itl1", "region_itl2"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_stats_mean_salary FOREIGN KEY ("mean_salary") REFERENCES salaries ("salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_stats_median_salary FOREIGN KEY ("median_salary") REFERENCES salaries ("salary_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Name of the age group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the age group */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race information */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status */,
  "dependents" INTEGER /* Number of dependents */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions_itl1" (
  "region_itl1_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each higher-level region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the higher-level region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the higher-level region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the region */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_itl1_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions_itl2" (
  "region_itl2_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lower-level region */,
  "region_itl1_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the higher-level region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the lower-level region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the lower-level region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the sub-region */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the sub-region in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_itl2_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regions_itl2_region_itl1_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_itl1_id") REFERENCES regions_itl1 ("region_itl1_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salaries" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary record */,
  "status" TEXT /* Employment status */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "mean_salary" REAL /* Mean salary for the status and year */,
  "median_salary" REAL /* Median salary for the status and year */,
  "min_salary" REAL /* Minimum salary */,
  "max_salary" REAL /* Maximum salary */,
  "salary_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of salary values (JSON array) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, economist, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_entry" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who entered or updated the data */,
  "entry_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was entered or updated */,
  "data_description" TEXT /* Description of the data entered or updated */,
  "entry_type" TEXT /* Type of data entry (e.g., new, update) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data entry (e.g., pending, approved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_entry_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "validation_rules" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation rule */,
  "rule_description" TEXT /* Description of the validation rule */,
  "rule_type" TEXT /* Type of validation (e.g., format, range, consistency) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the rule (e.g., critical, warning) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the rule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data issue */,
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data entry event */,
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the validation rule */,
  "issue_description" TEXT /* Description of the issue identified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the issue (e.g., open, resolved) */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date the issue was resolved */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_issues_entry_id FOREIGN KEY ("entry_id") REFERENCES data_entry ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_issues_rule_id FOREIGN KEY ("rule_id") REFERENCES validation_rules ("rule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "anonymization" (
  "anonymization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each anonymization event */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data being anonymized */,
  "anonymization_method" TEXT /* Method used for anonymization */,
  "anonymization_date" TEXT /* Date when the anonymization was performed */,
  "anonymization_level" TEXT /* Level of anonymization (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "anonymization_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the anonymization process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("anonymization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the report */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* Entities with which the report was shared */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the visualization */,
  "visualization_date" TEXT /* Date when the visualization was created */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., chart, map, table) */,
  "visualization_content" TEXT /* Content or description of the visualization */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the visualization (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the visualization */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* Entities with which the visualization was shared */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the prediction model */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  "prediction_model" TEXT /* Type of prediction model used */,
  "prediction_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the prediction */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the prediction (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Data source used for the prediction */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the prediction model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sharing" (
  "sharing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data sharing event */,
  "sharing_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was shared */,
  "sharing_entity" TEXT /* Entity with which the data was shared */,
  "shared_data" TEXT /* Description of the data shared */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data sharing (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date of approval for data sharing */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the data sharing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sharing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sharing_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_governance" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy */,
  "policy_name" TEXT /* Name of the data governance policy */,
  "policy_description" TEXT /* Description of the policy */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the policy became effective */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the policy (e.g., draft, active, retired) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the policy */,
  "reviewed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last reviewed the policy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_governance_reviewed_by FOREIGN KEY ("reviewed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
